title: Mace to DOOM Eternal Sentinel hammer
description: A small resource pack that replaces mace with a Sentinel hammer from DOOM Eternal
body:
**A small resource pack that replaces the Mace with an sentinel hammer from DOOM eternal**
 The set contains a hammer model that replaces the original Minecraft mace texture. The model has a custom first- and third-person hand position, as well as a thrown item position

model and textures by Arty.
